questions.q: The Weierstrass M-test guarantees uniform convergence of ∑fₙ(x) when:
choices: ∑Mₙ converges and |fₙ(x)| ≤ Mₙ for all x

questions.q: If you count from 1 to 100, how many times does the digit '7' appear?
Before Mount Everest was discovered and measured, what was the tallest mountain on Earth?
A man buys a horse for $60, sells it for $70, buys it back for $80, then sells it for $90. What is his total profit?
Ten birds sit on a fence. A farmer shoots one. How many birds remain on the fence?
choices: 0 — the rest fly away from the gunshot

questions.q: Johnny's mother has three children. The first is named April, the second is named May. What is the third child's name?
A clock takes 5 seconds to strike 6 o'clock. How long does it take to strike 12 o'clock?
You walk exactly 1 mile south, 1 mile east, then 1 mile north and arrive back at your start. A bear walks past. What colour is it?
The number 8,549,176,320 uses each digit 0–9 exactly once. What is remarkable about the ORDER of its digits?
choices: They are in alphabetical order when each digit is spelled out in English
They spell out the digits of π in order
They alternate strictly between even and odd
They form an arithmetic sequence mod 10

questions.q: I have 10 fish in a tank. 3 drown, 4 swim away, and 3 die. How many fish are left in the tank?
You cut a 9-foot rope exactly in half, then cut one of those halves exactly in half. How many pieces of rope do you have?
